name: Aspen Group
analysis: APZ has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 19% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$5.2100, stop A$4.4649, target A$5.8300 (0.83:1) — then trail it.
